name: Ribbon Refrigerator Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin and set aside to cool.
2. Place a layer of graham crackers in the loaf pan, fitting them snugly.
3. Spread the filling over the graham cracker layer. The filling is made by mixing powdered sugar, butter, beaten egg yolk, crushed pineapple, chopped walnuts, and stiffly beaten egg white.
4. Place the cake in the refrigerator to chill.
5. At serving time, a spoonful of whipped cream is an improvement.
Note: This recipe contains uncooked eggs and may pose a health hazard due to salmonella.
